name: Leggett & Platt, Incorporated
description: Leggett & Platt, Incorporated is a diversified American manufacturer that designs and produces a wide range of engineered components and products. Founded in 1883 and headquartered in Carthage, Missouri, the company serves various industries, including bedding, furniture, automotive, and specialized markets. Their innovative solutions are integrated into homes, offices, and vehicles worldwide, with a mission to enhance lives by delivering quality products and comfort-focused technologies. As a long-standing public company, Leggett & Platt continues to evolve its manufacturing capabilities to meet the changing needs of global consumers and industrial partners.
